findings.title: Weak Session Token Binding on Carrier Login
findings.description: Carrier session tokens are accepted without binding to device fingerprint or IP reputation, allowing session fixation after password reset.
findings.remediation_hint: Bind sessions to client context; rotate tokens on privilege change; reject reused tokens after reset.

findings.title: Stored XSS in Shipment Notes Widget
findings.description: Shipment notes accept raw HTML and render it in the dispatcher console without sanitization.
findings.remediation_hint: Sanitize HTML server-side; encode on render; prefer plain text or a strict allowlist.

findings.title: BOLA on Freight Invoice PDF
findings.description: Any authenticated warehouse operator can fetch another tenant's invoice PDF by changing invoice_id.
findings.remediation_hint: Enforce tenant ownership on every invoice read; use opaque non-guessable IDs plus authZ checks.

findings.title: SSRF via Tracking Webhook Preview
findings.description: Webhook preview fetches user-supplied URLs from the application network without blocking link-local or metadata addresses.
findings.remediation_hint: Allowlist schemes/hosts; block private and link-local ranges; use a network-isolated fetcher.

findings.title: No Rate Limit on Dock Door PIN Reset
findings.description: Dock door PIN reset accepts unlimited attempts, enabling brute force of 6-digit PINs.

evidence.response_snippet: No HTTP 429 observed; average 40ms per attempt

findings.remediation_hint: Rate-limit resets per dock and per actor; add lockout and audit alerts.

findings.title: SQL Injection in Inventory Lot Search
findings.description: lot_code is concatenated into a dynamic SQL WHERE clause in the WMS search service.
findings.remediation_hint: Use parameterized queries or a typed query builder; never concatenate user input into SQL.

findings.title: Verbose Stack Traces on Manifest Upload Failures
findings.description: Failed manifest uploads return internal exception class names and file paths to API clients.
findings.remediation_hint: Return generic client errors; log stack traces server-side only.
